programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: As the Evanses prepare to join James in Mississippi, a damper is thrown on everything.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Florida's attitude toward James' death causes dissension in an already saddened household.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Thelma's favorite teacher falls first for J.J.'s paintings and then for J.J.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Michael is pressured into becoming a member of a street gang that is terrorizing the neighborhood.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. resorts to crime in an effort to get his family out of the ghetto.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Florida has only one choice of action when she discovers what J.J. is doing for money.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.sub-title: Rich Is Better Than Poor ... Maybe
programme.desc: After J.J. wins the lottery, he is faced with two gun-toting members of a girls' gang.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. tries to lend a helping hand when Michael experiences his first great romance.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The children and Willona try to convince Florida to have some fun.

programme.title: The Secret She Kept
programme.desc: A successful attorney is on the brink of launching her political career when she begins to struggle, publicly and privately, with mental illness.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Bow invites her friends from college to an elaborate dinner party in hope of impressing them; Dre learns a lot about Bow's past; the kids decide to create their own reality show by documenting the party.

programme.title: black-ish
programme.desc: Dre suffers from self-doubt when an executive questions his street cred; Pops fears the worst when he receives a letter from the IRS.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Thelma enjoys a romantic relationship with an African student.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Thelma plans to move in with her African boyfriend despite Florida's objections.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise returns from Africa with a husband (Joseph C. Phillips) and a stepdaughter (Raven-Symone).

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff has to help when Theo and his roommates have trouble with their new landlord.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise and her new husband travel to Rhode Island to find a home at the Naval Base; Cliff gets to know his new step-granddaughter.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: The Huxtables are relieved to learn that Theo's learning problems are due to dyslexia.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Khadijah tries to break in a new secretary after Synclaire decides to quit.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Overton moves in with the girls after a fight with Kyle, but begins to drive them crazy.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: While celebrating Khadijah's birthday, Synclaire hits the jackpot in Atlantic City.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Kyle falls in love with Khadijah and Synclaire's new friend, but she isn't willing to commit.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A young mom is killed and dumped near a bike path in California, and law enforcement eyes her estranged husband; with no solid proof, the case goes cold until a shocking witness comes forward after 13 years to reveal what really happened.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Someone finds a Detroit trans woman living her truth shot to death one December morning; many suspect a hate crime, and after two witnesses come forward with different stories, detectives must determine which one is telling the truth.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young lady is swept off her feet by an older man who spoils her with attention and gifts, but soon learns her new guy is actually the kingpin of an interstate drug operation.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman joins the police force to provide a better life for her family, then she discovers her husband has been hanging around with some shady characters, and she is desperate to find out more.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young beauty catches the eye of a popular Jamaican dance-hall DJ; he gives her a life of luxury, and in return, she gives him undying loyalty and love.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Dwayne's preoccupation with Whitley affects his grades; Ron and Freddie plan a video.

programme.desc: Ron considers a career decision; Terrance (Cory Tyler) thinks his father (Glynn Turman) should reject an offer.

programme.desc: J.J., Thelma and Michael get involved in selling what people think is "hot" underwear.

programme.desc: Overton installs a high-tech burglar alarm in the girls' apartment after Regine is mugged.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Synclaire's holiday effervescence teaches everyone the true meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Khadijah hires a handsome writer without first checking his references.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: The Hand That Robs the Cradle
programme.desc: Max thinks she has to hide her relationship with a younger man from her friends.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: When a beloved boxer is shot to death at his home, the only thing more unbelievable is the man who pulled the trigger; as investigators unravel the sordid feud between two friends, they discover this was one ring that didn't have room for two.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: At Fitzgerald High School in Michigan, a stabbing between two students sends shockwaves through the community; as investigators race to find a reason for the attack, they zero in on a friendship warped by jealousy and betrayal.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman has the world at her fingertips until a charming bad boy sweeps her off her feet.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: After escaping a bad relationship, a young woman thinks she has finally found Mr. Right; she quickly realizes her new man is actually worse than her ex.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A beautiful young bank teller falls head over heels for a starving musician; under his spell, she becomes willing to risk it all to help him rob the bank where she works.

programme.desc: Whitley consults a counselor (Debbie Allen) for help in coping with her feelings about her ex-fiancé (Dominic Hoffman).
